ext_outer_wall_night.slug: EXT. DISTRICT ZERO OUTER WALL — NIGHT
ext_outer_wall_night.narrative_beat: The searchbeam finds nothing. It always finds nothing. This world is already finished. Nobody announced it.
ext_outer_wall_night.canonical: Monumental seawall at night — concrete face 25 metres high, water-stained, corroded steel reinforcement bars visible at base. Black churning water crashing against the wall base, catching searchbeam reflections. Behind the wall and above it: the drowned megacity skyline — Art Deco and Brutalist towers individually distinct, hundreds of dark windows, structural ribs, water-stain tide marks halfway up every facade. Each tower readable separately even at distance. Salt mist. Search beams sweeping in slow mechanical arcs from elevated positions.
ext_outer_wall_night.lighting_brief: Search beams: HMI 18K on motorised pan heads — cold 5600K, sweeping 4-second arcs. Building facades: practical LED strips at distant window grids — warm amber pinpoints. Water surface: picking up every beam reflection, black glass between sweeps. No fill light, no ambient warmth. Contrast ratio 15:1.
ext_outer_wall_night.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter
ext_outer_wall_night.dop_ref: Roger Deakins / Blade Runner 2049 (2017) — exterior water sequence

refs_angles_prompts.wide: Wide establishing shot. EXT. DISTRICT ZERO OUTER WALL — NIGHT. Empty scene, no people. Camera at ground level. Horizon at lower third. Architecture fills upper two-thirds. Strong vanishing point receding to infinity. Search beams: HMI 18K on motorised pan heads — cold 5600K, sweeping 4-second arcs. Camera shooting into the sweep path of moving light beams — periodic contre-jour when beam crosses lens axis. Architecture silhouetted during beam passage, returns to black between sweeps. Exposed for highlights — practical light sources at 70% IRE, shadow zones crushed to 2-4% IRE, no detail recovery in blacks. Out-of-focus light sources render as vertical oval ellipses — anamorphic bokeh, height 2× width. Bokeh edges soft with slight chromatic aberration fringe. ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter. Focus plane 8 metres — foreground sharp, distance progressively soft. Anamorphic horizontal flares on practicals. Kodak Vision3 500T EI 1000 — silver halide grain, natural halation. Roger Deakins / Blade Runner 2049 (2017) — exterior water sequence.
refs_angles_prompts.medium: Medium environmental shot. EXT. DISTRICT ZERO OUTER WALL — NIGHT. Empty scene, no people. Camera at chest height 1.5 metres. Dominant architectural element at left third. Open negative space right. Surface textures and material detail clearly readable. Search beams: HMI 18K on motorised pan heads — cold 5600K, sweeping 4-second arcs. Camera shooting into the sweep path of moving light beams — periodic contre-jour when beam crosses lens axis. Architecture silhouetted during beam passage, returns to black between sweeps. Exposed for highlights — practical light sources at 70% IRE, shadow zones crushed to 2-4% IRE, no detail recovery in blacks. Out-of-focus light sources render as vertical oval ellipses — anamorphic bokeh, height 2× width. Bokeh edges soft with slight chromatic aberration fringe. ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 50mm T2.8, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter. Focus plane 2.5 metres — wall surface razor-sharp, background in bokeh. Kodak Vision3 500T EI 1000 — silver halide grain, natural halation. Roger Deakins / Blade Runner 2049 (2017) — exterior water sequence.
refs_angles_prompts.detail: Extreme close-up macro. Monumental seawall at night — concrete face 25 metres high, water-stained, corroded steel reinforcement bars visible at base. Single texture element fills 80 percent of frame, subject bleeds off all edges. Empty scene, no people. Raking light 10 degrees to surface — micro-relief fully revealed. Search beams: HMI 18K on motorised pan heads — cold 5600K, sweeping 4-second arcs. Dominant material: oxidised riveted steel — rust bloom radiating from each rivet head, surface pitting 1-3mm deep, dark iron oxide film with localised orange flaking, micro-scale surface roughness Ra 50-100µm. Hard micro-shadows in surface pitting — penumbra under 0.5mm, shadow density 2% IRE. Black water surface: sharp inverted mirror reflection of search beam — 95% specular at normal incidence, reflection breaks into streaks on wave crests. Metal surface specularity: dull diffuse highlight on oxide film — broad 15% reflectivity, highlight size 3-5cm, no mirror reflection, surface micro-facets scatter incident light. Glass reflection: environment mirroring at 80% — visible inverted scene geometry in glazing, specular hotspot at key light angle. ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 100mm T2.3, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter. Focus plane 40 centimetres — 3cm sharp layer, all else dissolved. Camera shooting into the sweep path of moving light beams — periodic contre-jour when beam crosses lens axis. Architecture silhouetted during beam passage, returns to black between sweeps. Exposed for highlights — practical light sources at 70% IRE, shadow zones crushed to 2-4% IRE, no detail recovery in blacks. Out-of-focus light sources render as vertical oval ellipses — anamorphic bokeh, height 2× width. Bokeh edges soft with slight chromatic aberration fringe. Kodak Vision3 500T EI 1000 — microscopic silver grain on texture. Roger Deakins / Blade Runner 2049 (2017) — exterior water sequence.

int_transit_corridor_night.slug: INT. LOWER TRANSIT STACK — SERVICE CORRIDOR — NIGHT
int_transit_corridor_night.narrative_beat: She runs here. She knows this floor. A sealed route blinks — once, twice — then disappears. At the mouth of an unmapped corridor, one hand on the wall edge.
int_transit_corridor_night.canonical: Narrow maintenance corridor, 2.2m wide, extreme vanishing-point perspective to infinity. Corroded riveted steel walls — each rivet head individually textured with rust bloom. Dense cable tray bundles running the full length at 2m height, conduit packed in layers of 3-4. Wet concrete floor: puddles reflecting the single light source at the far end. Broken pipe joint mid-corridor releasing a horizontal steam jet that catches the backlight. Overhead: darkness. The single cage tungsten lamp at the far vanishing point is the only visible light source. Everything else in shadow.
int_transit_corridor_night.lighting_brief: Key: single cage tungsten work lamp at vanishing point 30m ahead — 2850K, 500W, generating circular warm glow that falls off sharply to full shadow on both sides. Practical: amber LED accent strips at ankle height on left wall — 2200K, 15% intensity. Ambient: cool blue reflection from wet floor — 6500K bounce from an unseen source behind camera. Ratio 8:1.
int_transit_corridor_night.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter
int_transit_corridor_night.dop_ref: Roger Deakins / Sicario (2015) — sub-tunnel approach sequence

int_pressure_valve_chamber_night.narrative_beat: The alarm cuts. Silence lands like a physical weight. The machine dwarfs her — she is ten percent of the frame. The maintenance error was not an error.
int_pressure_valve_chamber_night.canonical: Cathedral-scale industrial chamber — ceiling lost in darkness 15m above. Wall-to-wall pressure valve assembly: cast iron manifolds, 40cm diameter flanged pipes in arrays, valves with large wheel handles showing orange rust streaks. Scale crushing: human figures at 10% of frame height. Steam vent active — horizontal white jet at 2m height catches overhead fluorescent light. Emergency alarm strobe: white pulse cycling at 2Hz — hard shadows snapping across metal surfaces. Workers in worn coveralls visible as blurred distant figures.
int_pressure_valve_chamber_night.lighting_brief: Alarm strobe: white 5600K, cycling at 0.5Hz — spikes to 20:1 on each flash. Base: overhead emergency fluorescent strips — green-white 5000K wash at 15% intensity between flashes. Industrial practical: amber halogen on valve gauges — 2700K pin sources. Steam backlit by fluorescent overhead — diffused glow. Base ratio 6:1, alarm flash 12:1.
int_pressure_valve_chamber_night.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 800, 180deg shutter
int_pressure_valve_chamber_night.dop_ref: Denis Villeneuve / Arrival (2016) — interior industrial scale

int_voss_apartment_night.slug: INT. VOSS APARTMENT — LOWER STACK — LATE NIGHT
int_voss_apartment_night.narrative_beat: The desk lamp. The neon outside. The silence. A man who has been waiting for this moment for a long time.
int_voss_apartment_night.canonical: Cramped single-room apartment in a lower stack block — the room of a man who has been hiding something for years. Walls: peeling paint over exposed concrete, improvised shelving dense with folded papers, rolled documents, stacked containers — layers of accumulated knowledge. Centre: one scarred wooden table — clear surface, focal point of the room, lit by the lamp above. Ceiling: exposed pipe bundles running diagonally, single wire-hung practical lamp (amber, cloth-shade) hanging directly above the table. Narrow window at frame-left: condensation on glass — cold teal-blue neon from exterior building bleeding through, opposing the amber lamp. Floor: worn linoleum. Everything dense, layered, lived-in — the visual language of a man who waits and knows.
int_voss_apartment_night.lighting_brief: Two opposing light temperatures — the dramatic structure of the scene. Key: practical wire-hung lamp 2700K amber — cone falls directly on the table, radius 80cm, sharp falloff into surrounding darkness, ratio 6:1. Counter: cold exterior neon 4500K bleeding through condensation-fogged window at frame-left — barely 2% intensity, teal-blue separation on the far wall. Deep shadows fill 65% of frame. No fill, no bounce. The two temperatures never mix.
int_voss_apartment_night.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 50mm T2.8, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter
int_voss_apartment_night.dop_ref: Denis Villeneuve / Prisoners (2013) — domestic interior huis-clos, Roger Deakins

int_civic_atrium_morning.slug: INT. CIVIC ATRIUM — DISTRICT ZERO CENTRAL CORE — MORNING
int_civic_atrium_morning.narrative_beat: Hundreds move in patterns that suggest choreography, not freedom. His expression does not change.
int_civic_atrium_morning.canonical: Vast civic atrium: polished white marble floor 80m across. High glass ceiling — diffused grey morning sky visible above. Monumental screens 12m tall on the east wall — single giant face, monolithic portrait in cold grey tones, purely visual — image only, no written content, no symbols. Steel and glass balconies on three levels above ground floor. Ground floor: marble expanse, vast and controlled — the scale erases individual presence. Upper balcony (level 2): glass-and-steel railing, elevated observation position above the floor. The architecture expresses control through immaculate emptiness and overwhelming scale.
int_civic_atrium_morning.lighting_brief: Key: diffused daylight through high glass ceiling — overcast 6000K, flat overhead. Ground: marble bounce adding subtle fill from below. Upper balcony: harder shaft of directional daylight through narrower window — 4:1 ratio on Vale. No warm practicals. Clean, clinical, oppressive perfection. Overall ratio 3:1 in atrium, 5:1 on balcony.
int_civic_atrium_morning.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 400, 180deg shutter
int_civic_atrium_morning.dop_ref: Roger Deakins / Skyfall (2012) — Silva's island interior architecture

int_black_market_sublevel_day.slug: INT. BLACK MARKET EXCHANGE — VENTILATION SUBLEVEL — DAY
int_black_market_sublevel_day.narrative_beat: This is not erased infrastructure. It is masked infrastructure. Both calculating the other's risk at the same speed.
int_black_market_sublevel_day.canonical: Underground ventilation sublevel converted into an illegal signal market. Dense: vendor stalls from scavenged server racks, cable-draped canopies, stacked monitors at varying heights. Centre foreground: one flat examination surface — a cleared display spread, lit from below, focal point of the room. Ceiling: exposed ventilation ductwork — rectangular 60cm ducts, dust-covered grilles admitting thin grey daylight shafts. Wiring bundles looping between stall uprights. Neon tubes — pure cyan one side, pure amber the other — colour only, blank surfaces throughout. Ground: bare concrete, moisture seeping from walls.
int_black_market_sublevel_day.lighting_brief: Primary: amber LED strips under stall tables — 2000K, warm, from below creating uplight on vendor faces. Neon: cyan signage one side, amber the other — strong colour clash at 2m height. Daylight: thin grey shafts from ventilation grilles above — 6000K, narrow, cutting through haze. Result: warm amber foreground, colour neon mid, cold grey from above. Ratio 7:1.
int_black_market_sublevel_day.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 1600, 180deg shutter
int_black_market_sublevel_day.dop_ref: Denis Villeneuve / Blade Runner 2049 (2017) — underground market

int_security_ops_center_day.narrative_beat: He does not give the order to intercept. If she reaches the gate, I want to know what she thinks she saw.
int_security_ops_center_day.canonical: Control room occupying a converted upper-level space. Wall of displays: 12 screens in 4×3 grid — cold blue-cyan glow, geometric abstract overlays only, pure data visualisation shapes, no written content on any screen. Analyst stations in rows: 8 workstations, all facing the display wall, cold screen light washing from the front. Overhead: strip lighting dimmed to near-zero — 10% output. One large window behind: cold grey exterior backlight providing rim separation on all stations. The position 2m back from the display wall — standing, arms behind back — the commanding geometry of absolute authority.
int_security_ops_center_day.lighting_brief: Key: screen glow — cold cyan-blue 6500K washing analysts from front. Overhead: dimmed to near-zero — 10% of rated output. Window: cold grey exterior backlight providing rim on analysts. Vale backlit — near-silhouette with cold edge. Zero warm sources. Ratio 9:1 in shadows, 3:1 on illuminated analyst faces.
int_security_ops_center_day.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 800, 180deg shutter
int_security_ops_center_day.dop_ref: David Fincher / The Social Network (2010) — ops room cold interior

int_service_spine_night.narrative_beat: Emergency strips recede into fog. Green-tinted. Near-absolute darkness ahead. They have committed.
int_service_spine_night.canonical: Underground maintenance tunnel buried in the city's structural skeleton. Symmetrical bilateral composition with extreme central vanishing point. Wooden plank walls with horizontal steel crossbeam supports every 2m — aged wood, mineral deposits, surface rust. Corroded iron pipe bundles along both lower walls at floor level. Two parallel narrow-gauge railway tracks in dust-covered concrete floor. Emergency floor-level fluorescent strips at intervals on right wall — green-tinted 4000K, receding into atmospheric fog. Ancient relay control panel on left wall at mid-point: amber OLED backlit gauges, physical toggle switches, brass nameplates age-corroded to complete illegibility. Absolute darkness beyond 8 metres ahead.
int_service_spine_night.lighting_brief: Key: floor-level emergency fluorescent strips at right wall — green 4000K, extremely low angle, creating long horizontal shadows. Control panel: amber OLED back-glow 2700K — only visible warm source at close range. Fog/atmosphere: micro-particles in tunnel air scattering floor strips. Overhead: zero light — absolute ceiling darkness. Ratio 12:1. ISO pushed — visible grain.
int_service_spine_night.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 3200, 180deg shutter
int_service_spine_night.dop_ref: Roger Deakins / Sicario (2015) — sub-tunnel NVG sequence

int_observation_chamber.narrative_beat: Through the opening shutters: a city that was declared dead. She says it very quietly — like a diagnosis. They lied.
int_observation_chamber.canonical: Industrial observation chamber at massive scale — the hidden truth of the wall's interior. Pumping machinery filling the walls: large hydraulic cylinders, corroded copper piping with verdigris running floor-to-ceiling, pressure gauges, metal walkways at multiple heights. Critical detail: large-diameter pipes descend through the floor — sealed, pressurised, leading down into the lower sectors. Their scale and deliberate routing speaks of an engineered system, not maintenance. A bank of mechanical shutters across the outer wall: steel slats 30cm wide, hinged, motorised — currently opening. Through the opening shutters: the impossible view — organised lights in the far distance, the outside world declared dead. Red alarm ceiling strip flooding the chamber — 360-degree wall wash. Two competing light sources at war.
int_observation_chamber.lighting_brief: Red alarm: ceiling strip — 2700K red, wall-washing all interior surfaces. Through shutters: cold grey-blue exterior ambient — 7000K, growing stronger as shutters open. Interior vs exterior war: warm red vs cold blue-grey at the shutter threshold. Ratio 8:1 inside. Alarm active.
int_observation_chamber.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 32mm T2.3, ISO 800, 180deg shutter
int_observation_chamber.dop_ref: Alfonso Cuaron / Children of Men (2006) — revelation exterior light

int_voss_apartment_predawn.narrative_beat: Dark. The desk lamp is off. Cold light — a thin horizontal bar across the floor. She is carrying something enormous and trying not to show it.
int_voss_apartment_predawn.canonical: Same apartment as SCN_004, but now pre-dawn — the desk lamp is off, dead. The single small window admits the only light: cold pre-dawn blue 4500K, a thin horizontal bar of grey-blue falling across the floor and lower wall. The rest of the apartment: near-absolute darkness, objects reduced to silhouette shapes. The table at centre: the lamp above it extinguished, the surface now holding only shadow. At frame-right: the closed door — intact, still. Under the door gap: a thin line of corridor light, bright against the surrounding dark. A second shadow crosses that line of light. Then a third.
int_voss_apartment_predawn.lighting_brief: Pre-dawn exterior: 4500K cold blue through small window — single source, extremely low intensity. Acts as ambient wash from one direction only. No practicals. Faces: near-darkness, detail only from cold exterior bounce. Ratio 15:1. Then: door detonation — practical explosion flash, white 5600K, 1/24sec burst. Absolute contrast with dread silence before it.
int_voss_apartment_predawn.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 50mm T2.8, ISO 3200, 180deg shutter
int_voss_apartment_predawn.dop_ref: Roger Deakins / No Country for Old Men (2007) — pre-dawn interior, dread before violence
